name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Affected Component
- [ ] Backend (FastAPI)
- [ ] Frontend (React)
- [ ] Database
- [ ] Telegram Integration
- [ ] AI Digest Engine
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened instead.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment
- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 13, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Browser** (if frontend): [e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121]
- **Python Version**: [e.g., 3.10, 3.11]
- **Node Version**: [e.g., 18.0, 20.0]
- **Database**: [e.g., PostgreSQL 14]

## Error Messages / Logs
```
Paste any error messages or relevant logs here
```

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## Possible Solutions
If you have any ideas on how to fix this, please share them here.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues and found no duplicates
- [ ] I have provided clear steps to reproduce
- [ ] I have included relevant error messages/logs
- [ ] I have specified the affected component(s)
